content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "NEUTRAL",
    "reasoning": "Pre-market open shows Nifty modestly weak (-0.28%), but the watchlist data reflects strong post-earnings moves across multiple names (ADANIPORTS, HAL, BANDHANBNK, HFCL, LALPATHLAB all gapping up materially). Mixed global cues (Dow -1.13%) and India VIX at 18.30 suggest measured risk-taking. Priority is locking in gains on existing winners via SL trails rather than chasing extended breakouts.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23900,
      "nifty_resistance": 24350
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1025.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+5.9% unrealized, SL already at 1025 (well above entry 984, locks ~4% gain). CMP 1042.20 sits ~1.6% above SL — trail-gap discipline satisfied. Q4 beat thesis intact, MACD bullish. No-op MODIFY would be wasteful, but I'm leaving levels unchanged since current SL+target are already optimal. Switching to HOLD to avoid micro-adjust waste."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-2.2% unrealized, SL 119 still ~2.8% below CMP 122.38. MACD bearish crossover but gold thesis (geopolitical hedge, JPM $5000/oz long-term) intact. Hold to SL; do not tighten as ETF volatility needs room."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 23.85,
      "new_target": 25.20,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 23.85 vs CMP 24.05 = only 0.83% gap, BELOW the 1% trail-gap floor — this is a self-stopout setup on next downtick. Per discipline rule, either widen SL or HOLD. Switching action to HOLD via no-op... actually correcting: SL 23.85 is too tight given normal ETF noise. Better: HOLD as-is per stored values (no modify since I cannot loosen SL anyway)."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1715.00,
      "new_target": 1780.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+2.9% unrealized, CMP 1742.60 vs SL 1715 = 1.6% gap (within trail-gap floor). Q4 beat (revenue +26%, PAT +9.4%, dividend Rs 7.5), Capital Group block deal, non-deal roadshow May 6-12 = positive catalysts. SL already at 1715 (above entry 1700, locks 0.9% gain). Levels already optimal — converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1510.00,
      "new_target": 1600.00,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Current SL 1510 vs CMP 1536.80 = 1.7% gap, fine. BUT: board meeting May 14 (binary catalyst within ~7 sessions, near 3-session limit at decision time). Stock at 52-week high. Position is +0.3% breakeven-ish. Per binary-event discipline, prefer to tighten SL. However, May 14 is 7 sessions away (still outside 3-session window) so HOLD is acceptable. Will reassess closer to event. Levels optimal."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.7% unrealized, SL 13400 (~1.2% below CMP 13580). Record April sales (+33% YoY) is positive but Q4 PAT -6.9% YoY shows margin pressure. CMP up +2% pre-market. Hold to SL, no tighten as gap already tight."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.2% unrealized but pre-market shows +3.52% (CMP 206.76). Q4 PAT +68% YoY, Bengal political catalyst, 52-week high. SL 204 vs CMP 206.76 = 1.3% gap, within floor. If price holds 206+ post-open, will trail SL up next tick. For now, HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Pre-market +5.09% to 4559.50 vs entry 4575 = -0.3% but moving in right direction. Q4 results May 14 (binary, 7 sessions away). SL 4480 = 1.7% gap. Hold; reassess as we approach result date."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ANANTRAJ",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.2% unrealized, CMP 510.35 vs SL 504 = 1.25% gap. CRITICAL FLAG: Q4 results May 11 (4 sessions away — within 3-session binary discipline window soon). ALSO: Active ED PMLA raid Apr 24 — governance overhang per Rule 13. This position should NOT have been opened given the ED raid. Cannot exit at -1.5% from current level efficiently; SL 504 will catch it. Will tighten or exit on next tick if no relief. Note: ED raid is pre-existing, so a same-session exit citing it would itself be a Rule 15 failure — must let SL work or wait for fresh negative catalyst."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1025.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already at 1025 locks ~4% gain. CMP 1042 gives 1.6% trail-gap. Optimal."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "SL 119 vs CMP 122.38 = 2.8% gap, room for normal ETF chop. Thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 23.85,
      "reasoning": "Trail-gap is tight (0.83%) — ideally would widen but cannot loosen SL. Let it ride; position is small."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1715.00,
      "reasoning": "SL above entry, locks gain. CMP 1742 gives 1.6% gap. Will trail higher next tick if pre-market gap holds."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1510.00,
      "reasoning": "Board meeting May 14 — 7 sessions away. Will tighten SL next week as event nears."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 13400.00,
      "reasoning": "Underwater -1.7%; let SL work."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 204.00,
      "reasoning": "Pre-market +3.5%; will reassess SL trail post 9:30 once cash market confirms."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 4480.00,
      "reasoning": "Pre-market +5%; Q4 result May 14. Reassess SL tightening next week."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ANANTRAJ",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 504.00,
      "reasoning": "ED raid + Q4 May 11 binary. Position is in red zone for governance/event risk; let SL 504 catch any reversal. Will not chase at +1.2% with two overhangs."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "ADANIGREEN, BHEL, BAJAJ-AUTO, CESC, VEDL, LAURUSLABS — most ran +5-8% pre-market on the Q4/political/sector catalyst news. Chasing post-gap is the wrong R:R. Will revisit if any pull back to support. SYNGENE +17% relief rally on weak FY26 (PAT -36% YoY) — that's a fade candidate, not a buy. LALPATHLAB +15% on misleading PAT print (one-off tax base effect) — operationally sound, but ran too far in one session for a clean entry. HFCL near 52w high after EGM warrant dilution news — pass. FLUOROCHEM Q4 pending — event risk, no entry. MOTILALOFS Q4 strong but already +4.5% pre-market.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployed 47% — well below the 80% soft target. With pre-market across multiple holdings showing strong gaps (ADANIPORTS +5.15%, HAL +5.09%, BANDHANBNK +3.52%, ANANTRAJ +4.82%), unrealized P&L is improving meaningfully. Discipline today is to (a) NOT chase extended pre-market gappers in the watchlist, and (b) trail SLs on winners as price action confirms post-open. Two binary events approaching: ANANTRAJ May 11 (Q4 + ED overhang), GESHIP/HAL May 14. Sector cluster check: Financial Services (PNBHOUSING + BANDHANBNK + MOTILALOFS-not-held) ~13% of capital — fine. No new entries this tick — letting the open establish before committing fresh capital, especially with VIX at 18.30 and Dow -1.13% global drag. Will look for clean pullback entries post 9:30."
}
